content: Update Profile.jsx language selector (12 langs with native names + immediate apply)
Bootstrap i18n in index.js + mount LanguageSync in AppLayout
Replace hardcoded strings with t() in shell + key pages (TopNav, BottomTabs, Login, Register, Home, Profile, Closet)
Audit RTL mirroring for Hebrew/Arabic (verified via screenshot: dir=rtl, layout mirrored)
Localize AI output (stylist + garment_vision) via preferred_language prompt
Run backend testing agent for i18n persistence + AI localization
